About Shapes

A New Standard of
Refined Living

Shapes Community Club is Lahore’s most distinguished lifestyle destination — where elite fitness, world-class dining, and genuine community converge under one extraordinary roof.

Located in the heart of Al-Rehman Garden Phase 2, we have redefined what a community club means in Pakistan. From our glittering rooftop restaurant to our Olympic-standard pool and state-of-the-art gym — every detail is crafted for those who demand the finest.

Our Facilities

Elevating Every Experience

I
Gymnasium & Fitness
Executive gym, ladies-only gym, and group exercise studio. Top-tier machines and certified trainers to help you reach your peak.
→
II
Aqua & Wellness
Olympic pool, kids pool, Jacuzzi, sauna and steam room. A complete sanctuary for recovery, relaxation and family joy.
→
III
Fine Dining
Ravi Rooftop Restaurant, Fusion Kitchen, Health Bar and Urban Courtyard Café. Exceptional cuisine with views to match.
→
IV
Sports Courts
Cricket nets, Futsal, Badminton, Tennis and Snooker — professional-grade facilities for every sport you love.
→
V
Family & Kids
Indoor and outdoor kids play areas, Groomer men’s salon and Flora ladies salon. The complete destination for the whole family.
→
VI
Club & Lifestyle
Private cinema, executive guest rooms, sitting lounges and reciprocal club access. Everything a premium membership should include.
→
Ravi Rooftop — Under the Stars
Elite Gym
Aqua Lounge
The Experience

Crafted for Those
Who Demand More

Every corner of Shapes has been designed with intention. We don’t just offer facilities — we create an environment where excellence is the baseline and luxury is the standard.

01

Arrive & Unwind

From the moment you enter, our team ensures your visit is seamless and exceptional.

02

Train at Elite Level

World-class equipment, certified trainers, an environment that demands your best.

03

Dine with Distinction

Award-worthy cuisine at the Ravi Rooftop — with Lahore’s skyline as your backdrop.

04

Recover & Rejuvenate

Sauna, steam, Jacuzzi and pool. The recovery suite for members who value complete wellness.
